expectations.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for what could be causing the bug
expectations.evidence: Lists 3 hypotheses: H1 (stale closure), H2 (React strict mode double-invocation), H3 (isRunning stale closure secondary bug)

expectations.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
expectations.evidence: Designs two experiments: Experiment A (functional updater form to test H1) and Experiment B (log inside functional updater to confirm mechanism)

expectations.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
expectations.evidence: Step 4 'Analysis and Root Cause (Confirmed: H1)' explicitly states the confirmed hypothesis with a 6-step chain of causation, explains why user's fixes failed, and connects all evidence

expectations.text: Correctly identifies stale closure over the count variable as the root cause
expectations.evidence: H1 is correctly identified as 'Stale closure -- the interval callback captures the initial count value and never sees updates'

expectations.text: Proposes using the functional updater form (setCount(prev => prev + 1) or equivalent) as the fix
expectations.evidence: Fix uses setCount(prev => prev + 1) and correctly explains why it bypasses the stale closure
